name: Brock Purdy
headline: Healthy Purdy and a revamped receiver room make him a value QB1
body:
Even hobbled by turf toe in 2025, Purdy posted a 0.229 EPA per play, a 54% success rate, and a 7.2 CPOE across nine starts -- elite efficiency that ranks among the best in the league when he plays. The problem was availability: nine games capped him at 2,167 yards and 177 fantasy points, and a 12.3% bad-throw rate hints at lingering discomfort. Across 2023-24 he cleared 290 fantasy points twice while throwing for 30-plus combined scores, so the ceiling is established when his body cooperates.

The weaponry got an overhaul, with Mike Evans and Christian Kirk joining McCaffrey and Pearsall, though Kittle's Achilles recovery clouds the early schedule. Projections call for roughly 4,150 yards, 28 touchdowns, and 300-plus fantasy points, and his 33 carries and three rushing scores in 2025 add a usable floor. At an ADP near pick 96 and a back-end QB1 tag, he's a profit play -- buy the efficiency and bet on health.
